items.name: BetterAuth-Convex-9ui-shadcn-CLI-
items.description: 🔐 A Better Auth + Convex setup with React 19 & Vite. Full auth flows (magic links, OTP, TOTP, social sign-in), strong security, styled UI, & realtime sync. Perfect for MVPs 🚀, demos 🚧 or production-ready 💻 apps.
